# Stop. Read this first.

**Do not file public security issues here.**

If you have found a vulnerability, a way to deanonymize users, a way to drain
fees, a TS / Aiken encoding-parity bug, or any other security-relevant issue,
**email it privately** to:

> **support@logicalmechanism.io**

Filing publicly puts every current Preprod user at risk and burns the
disclosure window before we can fix it. We will not be upset that you reached
out by email; we will be very upset if you post a working exploit on the
public tracker.

See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for the disclosure policy: scope, what we
care about, response timelines, and how we credit researchers.

---

## When this template _is_ appropriate

This template is only for **public, non-sensitive questions about the
disclosure process itself**. Examples:

- "I sent a report on date X and got no acknowledgement. Is the inbox alive?"
- "Is dependency Y in scope?"
- "Can the security policy clarify behavior Z?"

## What you want to ask

<!-- Public, non-exploit-bearing question only. -->

## Confirmation

- [ ] I have read SECURITY.md.
- [ ] My question does **not** disclose an exploit, vulnerability, attack
      vector, or any detail that would let a third party harm a user.
- [ ] If this is an actual disclosure, I will close this issue and email
      support@logicalmechanism.io instead.
